faqs.q: What if the generated schemas have errors?
faqs.a: PRINTER will flag validation issues. Review them and provide corrections before moving to Step 3.

faqs.q: Can I modify the generated code?
faqs.a: Yes! The specs are a starting point. Adjust them to match your specific needs before building.

faqs.q: What if a feature doesn't map to the framework?
faqs.a: PRINTER will mark it as "custom required". You'll need to implement it manually in Step 3.

faqs.q: How do I know if the specs are complete?
faqs.a: Check the validation section. All checkboxes should be ✅. If any are missing, ask for additional specs.

faqs.q: Do I need to approve specs even if I don't understand them?
faqs.a: No! Ask PRINTER to explain any unclear parts. Understanding the specs helps prevent issues in Step 3.
